{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/habr-unique-projects/extra-examples/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "extra-examples"
tags:
  * habr-unique-projects
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. extra-examples

_Файлов:_ 13

h2. Содержание

* [[00-question-habr-examples|00-question-habr-examples.md]] — 
* [[01-svyazi-andrey-chuyan|01-svyazi-andrey-chuyan.md]] — 
* [[02-vshe-scientific-networking|02-vshe-scientific-networking.md]] — 
* [[03-brainbox-multi-ai-hub|03-brainbox-multi-ai-hub.md]] — 
* [[04-claude-subagents-patterns|04-claude-subagents-patterns.md]] — 
* [[05-hw-nl2workflow|05-hw-nl2workflow.md]] — 
* [[06-platform-for-professional-communities|06-platform-for-professional-communities.md]] — 
* [[07-specialized-knowledge-workspace|07-specialized-knowledge-workspace.md]] — 
* [[08-personal-multi-agent-hub|08-personal-multi-agent-hub.md]] — 
* [[09-federated-platform|09-federated-platform.md]] — 
* [[10-profession-specific-workflows|10-profession-specific-workflows.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[11-concrete-potential-collaborator|11-concrete-potential-collaborator.md]] — 
* [[12-concrete-next-step|12-concrete-next-step.md]] — > [!IMPORTANT]



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[04-claude-subagents-patterns]] (сходство 0.16)
* [[07-specialized-knowledge-workspace]] (сходство 0.16)
* [[09-federated-platform]] (сходство 0.15)
